case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. JASMINE MARIE GOMEZ

docket_entries.description: ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER PLAINTIFF REQUEST APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. REPRESENTED BY SOFIA REYES LEGAL SPECIALIST.
